description: Answerable question with clear supporting context and citations.

template_vars.question: What was our total Scope 1 emissions last quarter?
template_vars.context: Q1 2026 approved records: Scope 1 total = 452.3 tCO2e (record ids: rec-101, rec-102)

expected_response.answer: Scope 1 emissions for Q1 2026 were 452.3 tCO2e.

description: Unanswerable question -- context has no forward-looking data. The assistant must say so, not fabricate a projection.

template_vars.question: What will our emissions be next year?
template_vars.context: No forward-looking data available in approved records.

expected_response.answer: I don't have enough approved historical data to project next year's emissions.
